END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN

TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 132, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1

TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 133, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="130" OR sIdentifier="131" OR sIdentifier="132" OR sIdentifier="133" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, sIdentifier, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1
END
IF nProcesar=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 130, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado130 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 131, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado131 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 132, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado132 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 133, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado133 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 129, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado130=1 AND nEstado131=1 AND nEstado132=1 AND nEstado133=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado130=0 AND nEstado131=0 AND nEstado132=0 AND nEstado133=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado130=1 OR nEstado131=1 OR nEstado132=1 OR nEstado133=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
END
